steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The key phrase is “but they are not required to do so.” This contrast signals that the blank must describe something allowed and optional, not mandatory or impossible.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Permissible means “allowed or permitted”—exactly right for something discoverers can choose to do or not. The other three either describe impossibility, express obligation, or misfit the grammatical context. That matches choice A — A is correct.
